scripts.build: pnpm build:discovery && pnpm build:sitemap && astro build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');for(const f of ['sitemap-index.xml','sitemap-0.xml'])fs.rmSync('dist/'+f,{force:true})"
scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter @seo/web... build && wrangler d1 migrations apply seo-telemetry --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.preview:cloudflare: pnpm build && wrangler d1 migrations apply seo-telemetry --local && wrangler dev
scripts.typecheck: wrangler types worker/worker-configuration.d.ts --include-runtime false --check && astro check && tsc -p worker/tsconfig.json
